highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.3 previewed a broad native-dependency refresh and a NativeAOT crash fix.
highlights_body: The preview rolled the bundled libpng, libwebp and brotli, added Spectre mitigation to the Linux native, and fixed a NativeAOT crash when reflection is disabled. This line was never released as stable — everything here rolled up into 3.119.4.

bullets.detail: Bumps libpng to 1.6.54, libwebp to 1.6.0 and brotli to 1.2.0, and removes a few unused externals so the surface stays lean.

bullets.lead: Skia submodule re-pointed at the squashed commit
bullets.detail: Repoints the Skia submodule at the squashed upstream commit so the merge history is clean going into 3.119.4.
Fixes a crash when SkiaSharp is consumed from a NativeAOT app that has reflection disabled via `IlcDisableReflection=true`.

bullets.lead: Linux ARM64 no longer crashes on missing fontconfig
bullets.detail: Adds the fontconfig runtime library to the cross-compile sysroot so Linux ARM64 builds locate fontconfig at runtime and no longer crash on first text draw.

bullets.lead: Spectre mitigation on libSkiaSharp for Linux and Windows
bullets.detail: Enables the Spectre mitigation compiler flag for `libSkiaSharp.dll` on Windows and `libSkiaSharp.so` on Linux to reduce the impact of speculative-execution side-channel attacks.

contributor_summaries.sshumakov: Added the Spectre mitigation compiler flag to `libSkiaSharp.dll` and `libSkiaSharp.so`

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 rolled libpng, libwebp and brotli, pruned unused externals, fixed the NativeAOT `IlcDisableReflection` crash and the Linux ARM64 fontconfig crash, and enabled Spectre mitigation on the Windows and Linux native binaries.
